cta_banner.heading: Ready to connect?
cta_banner.body: Join thousands of people building real connections through skills and shared experiences.

plans.heading: Find the right plan for you
plans.subheading: Start free, upgrade when you're ready. All plans include access to our verified community.

standard.name: Standard
standard.description: Great for getting started and exploring the platform.

premium.name: Premium
premium.description: For those who want more connections and better matches.

elite.name: Elite

contact.heading: Contact us
contact.body: Have a question, a partnership idea, or need help? Fill in the form and we'll get back to you within 1–2 business days.
contact.success_body: We'll get back to you within 1–2 business days.

how_it_works_page.heading: How it works
how_it_works_page.intro: From creating your profile to building real connections — here's how SkillConnect works.

steps.title: Create your profile
steps.description: Sign up and build your profile by adding your skills, personality traits, interests, education, and experience. You can also verify your profile for added trust.
details: Set your personality traits and interests
Choose your session types and pricing

steps.title: Choose your role
steps.description: Select whether you would like to participate as a provider, a seeker, or both.

steps.title: Browse and discover
steps.description: Find the right match using smart filters and recommendations. Use our matching algorithm to find people who complement your skills and interests.
details: Filter by skill, location, age, gender, and price
Match based on personality traits and interests

steps.title: Chat and connect
steps.description: Send a message or book a session directly. Ask questions, share your goals, find the right match and start connecting.
details: Rate and review after each session

steps.title: Meet & grow
steps.description: Learn new skills, build meaningful connections, join group meetups and events, or simply share an experience.
details: All members can participate in community events
Premium members can create their own events
Elite members receive invitations to exclusive VIP networking events

seeker_points: Include skills, interests, and personality traits
provider_points: Set your own pricing and session types
Promote your profile for more visibility (optional)

faqs.a: SkillConnect is a skills and social matching platform. Connections are based on personality, skills, and shared interests, helping users to build both professional and social connections.

faqs.q: Why can't I chat or connect?
faqs.a: To connect with providers, seekers need to upgrade to a paid plan (Standard, Premium, or Elite). Subscriptions can be canceled anytime.

faqs.q: What if I do not have adequate skills, experience, or education?
faqs.a: No problem — you can still connect based on personality and shared interests, whether for social companionship or making friends.

faqs.q: Can I be both a provider and a seeker?
faqs.a: Yes. Your profile has two layers — a social layer and a skills layer. You can offer services and seek connections at the same time.
Users can verify their email, phone number, identity, and more. Verified profiles display a badge.
You may choose verified profiles for enhanced safety and connect with real, active users.
Users may be blacklisted after repeated complaints such as no-shows, lack of responsiveness, or inappropriate behavior. Warnings are given before blacklisting to protect the community.
The platform is currently focused on Japan but available in English and Japanese. International expansion is planned.

how_it_works_page.questions_body: If you have any additional questions or run into issues, feel free to contact us. Our team typically responds within 1–2 business days.
